source_pr.title: lightning: migrate test-infra to tesify for lightning_test.go
source_pr.body:
This closes #28245 .

Signed-off-by: tison <wander4096@gmail.com>

### Release note

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: -// multi times, hence data race may happen. However, the operation setting up the global logger is idempotent.
failure_signature: -// multi times, hence data race may happen. However, the operation setting up the global logger is idempotent.
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR is primarily a test-infra migration (splitting/rewriting Lightning tests to use testify). The captured evidence is a comment about a potential data race, but the available case data does not provide a concrete flaky failure signature or a clearly targeted stabilization change beyond the migration.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: -// multi times, hence data race may happen. However, the operation setting up the global logger is idempotent.

analysis:
